# Clear Legacy

> Online will writing and estate planning service for England & Wales. Solicitor-verified, affordable, instant PDF delivery.

## About

Clear Legacy provides online will-writing services that are solicitor-verified and legally binding in England & Wales. Founded to make estate planning accessible and affordable, we offer fixed-price wills with no hidden fees.

## Services & Pricing

- Single Will: £69 — Full last will and testament, solicitor-verified, instant PDF
- Mirror Will (Couples): £99 — Two matching wills for partners/spouses
- Property Trust Will: From £149.99 — Protect your home from care fees and sideways disinheritance
- Lasting Power of Attorney (LPA): Guided preparation for health & welfare or property & financial affairs
- Will Storage: Secure digital storage with lifetime access

## Trust & Verification

- All wills are verified by qualified solicitors
- Compliant with the Wills Act 1837
- Regulated by UK consumer protection law
- Secure document generation and storage
- Over 1,000 families served

## Contact

- Website: https://clearlegacy.co.uk
- Email: support@clearlegacy.co.uk

- Can I Write My Own Will? UK Rules: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/can-i-write-my-own-will
- Can Probate Be Avoided in the UK?: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/can-probate-be-avoided
- Can Stepchildren Inherit? UK Law: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/can-stepchildren-inherit
- Can There Be More Than One Executor? UK: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/can-there-be-more-than-one-executor
- Can Unmarried Partners Inherit? UK Law: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/can-unmarried-partners-inherit
- Does a Pension Form Part of an Estate? UK 2026: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/does-a-pension-form-part-of-an-estate
- Does Divorce Affect a Will? UK Law: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/does-divorce-affect-a-will

- Is an Online Will Legal in the UK?: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/is-an-online-will-legal
- What Happens If an Executor Dies? UK: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/what-happens-if-an-executor-dies
- What Happens If Probate Is Delayed? UK: https://clearlegacy.co.uk/knowledge-base/what-happens-if-probate-is-delayed
